query: vintage photograph with light leak streaks across edge film burn artifact lo-fi
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: light leak — film burn streaks, analog defects, motion-blur light trails, lo-fi authenticity

response.objective_caption: Warm-toned diagonal stripes of gold, amber, and off-white cross over darker brown and bronze areas. Pale rectangular forms appear among the overlapping angled bands. The image is framed by a thin black border.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph captured with heavy intentional motion blur, showing diagonal streaks of gold, amber, and off-white sweeping across deep brown tones. The extreme blur dissolves any recognizable subject and eliminates fine detail, rendering pale rectangular patches and warm bands into flowing, non-representational color and gesture within a black border.
